# Before Day 1 | What to Have Ready

<callout icon="🎒" color="blue_bg">
	**BEFORE DAY 1** | Sent to every registrant a few days before Sun Jun 21 | Five minutes to gather | All times SGT
</callout>

<callout icon="✅" color="green_bg">
	**Have these ready before Day 1:**
	- A Claude account, free or paid, with access to Projects (https://TEAM-TO-ADD/claude-signup).
	- Your product details: what you sell, the price, and one line on what makes it different.
	- Who you sell to: one sentence on your ideal customer and their main problem.
	- 2 to 3 things you have written: old posts, captions, emails, even voice-note transcripts.
	- Your phone, for the Day 8 video only (2 minutes, no editing).
	That is it. No design tools. No image tools. No code.
</callout>

## What You Do NOT Need

- A big following. A finished store or website. Tech or coding skills. A budget (it is free with your membership).

## The 30-Minutes-a-Day Promise

Every day is one focused task, about 30 minutes. Two days have a deadline you cannot miss:

<table fit-page-width="true" header-row="true">
<tr color="blue_bg">
<td>Gate</td>
<td>Date (SGT)</td>
<td>What</td>
</tr>
<tr color="red_bg"><td>Gate 1</td><td>Sun Jun 28</td><td>A 2-minute phone video</td></tr>
<tr color="red_bg"><td>Gate 2</td><td>Sat Jul 4</td><td>Your final agent, 1-page brief, and a demo idea</td></tr>
</table>

Graduate Sun Jul 5. Then the Summit is Wed Jul 8, be there, that is where winners are announced.

## Where Everything Lives

- Daily tasks and posting: <https://TEAM-TO-ADD/community>
